{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Skysworn composition
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The approaching [[Skysworn]] group consists of four Truegolds, four Highgolds, six Lowgolds, and one [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
